prompt.content:
Make the following changes to the RMBS vs MTSI analysis in the merger model
1.	Update the MTSI’s share price at acquisition to the daily volume weighted average price between January 2, 2025 and December, 31, 2025 (inclusive of start and end dates)
2.	Update the %SG&A Synergies to 40%
3.	Run a sensitivity analysis on the proforma leverage by varying the following assumptions and report the resulting percentage increase / (decrease) in leverage for each scenario:
a.	% cash consideration = 0% and % bid premium = 10%
b.	% cash consideration = 0% and % bid premium = 30%
c.	% cash consideration = 40% and % bid premium = 10%
d.	% cash consideration = 40% and % bid premium = 30%
Note: Leverage mentioned above refers to the Net Debt to equity ratio. And the base reference for growth is the standalone RMBS value compared to the pro forma value

Show results in % and to 2 decimal places

rubrics.name: States the Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 10% bid premium and 0% cash... (ver_8e7268a27bea47bd8265dbeeebef0a1c)

messages.content: States the Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 10% bid premium and 0% cash consideration is -147.44% (acceptable range -148.91% to -145.97%).

rubrics.name: States the Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 10% bid premium and 40% cash... (ver_8689cdf844dc4064b95cb12c2fb6d6ce)

messages.content: States the Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 10% bid premium and 40% cash consideration is -732.04% (acceptable range -739.36% to -724.72%).

rubrics.name: States the Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 30% bid premium and 0% cash... (ver_02d57fc3a83c4d4bbac355ed4b3a7f94)

messages.content: States the Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 30% bid premium and 0% cash consideration is -140.93% (acceptable range -142.34% to -139.52%).

rubrics.name: States the Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 30% bid premium and 40% cash... (ver_f26afa570170495da1d0c42197e9b248)

messages.content: States the Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 30% bid premium and 40% cash consideration is -735.29% (acceptable range -742.64% to -727.94%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
The Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 10% bid premium and 0% cash consideration is -147.44%
The Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 10% bid premium and 40% cash consideration is -732.04%
The Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 30% bid premium and 0% cash consideration is -140.93%
The Increase/(decrease) in leverage at 30% bid premium and 40% cash consideration is -735.29%
